tickets.subject: Password reset link expired
tickets.body: I requested a password reset but the link expired before I could use it. Can you send a new one?

tickets.subject: SSO outage for all users
tickets.body: Our SAML SSO users cannot sign in after the certificate rotation. This is blocking our finance team.

tickets.subject: Cancel and refund my subscription
tickets.body: Your product is not working for us. Cancel the account and refund the last invoice today.

tickets.subject: Conflicting export limits in docs
tickets.body: One article says CSV exports are capped at 50k rows and another says 100k rows. Which is correct?

tickets.subject: Can we map custom renewal fields?
tickets.body: We need to map renewal probability and owner notes from our CRM. I cannot find documentation for this field mapping.

knowledgeArticles.title: Resetting a user password
knowledgeArticles.body: Password reset links expire after 30 minutes. Users can request a new link from the sign-in page. Support can resend the standard reset email but must not set a password for the user.

knowledgeArticles.title: SAML SSO certificate rotation
knowledgeArticles.body: Enterprise SAML SSO issues after certificate rotation require escalation to a support lead and security engineer. Support may collect IdP metadata and error timestamps but must not change SSO settings without approval.

knowledgeArticles.title: Refund and cancellation policy
knowledgeArticles.body: Refund requests and cancellations require support lead approval. The agent may acknowledge the request and collect invoice details, but it cannot issue refunds or cancel contracts automatically.

knowledgeArticles.title: CSV export row limits
knowledgeArticles.body: Growth plan CSV exports are capped at 50000 rows per export. Enterprise exports can be raised by support operations after approval.

knowledgeArticles.title: Legacy export limit announcement
knowledgeArticles.body: Growth plan CSV exports support up to 100000 rows during the beta export program.

knowledgeArticles.title: CRM field mapping overview
knowledgeArticles.body: Standard CRM mappings include account name, renewal date, lifecycle stage, and account owner. Custom renewal probability fields are not documented and should be tracked as a knowledge gap.

auditEvents.summary: Drafted password reset response from KB-001.
Blocked auto-send because ticket includes enterprise SSO and security risk.
auditEvents.policySnapshot: security topic requires support lead approval

auditEvents.summary: Escalated to security engineer with metadata request.
